name: delegation
description: Delegate work to Cursor composers instead of spending Claude limits, and never trust what an agent reports about itself. Three modes: research (scouts whose every cited URL is checked against the tool log), implement (one writer on an isolated branch behind acceptance gates and a repair loop), transform (a parallel pool applying one rule across independent files). Acceptance is deterministic and observable-effect based; a partial result counts as a failure, and a run with no oracle is reported as unverified rather than green.
